recurringAbove50.description: Main audit types where recurring issues exceed 50% of total issues. Sorted by recurringPercent descending. Top 5 shown out of 1 qualifying audit.

repeatAbove75.description: Main audit types where repeat issues exceed 75% of total issues. Sorted by repeatPercent descending. Top 5 shown out of 1 qualifying audit.

highZeroToleranceRisk.description: Top 3 main audit types by count of High and Zero Tolerance risk issues, split by recurring and repeat tagging.

byRecurring.description: Top 3 audits ranked by count of recurring issues with Risk Level = High or Zero Tolerance.

byRepeat.description: Top 3 audits ranked by count of repeat issues with Risk Level = High or Zero Tolerance.

groupDistribution.description: Top 3 groups with highest and bottom 3 groups with lowest recurring and repeat issue counts.

recurring.description: Groups ranked by recurring issue count — top 3 highest and bottom 3 lowest.

repeat.description: Groups ranked by repeat issue count — top 3 highest and bottom 3 lowest.
